book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the north
The hotel should include free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 8 people and 5 nights starting from monday
If the booking fails how about 2 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve austrian food and should be in the same price range as the hotel
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 19:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
